text:
There once was a quiet little town named Serenity Haven. Every year they had the Town Fair, and everyone looked forward to it all summer. At the heart of the festivities was the grand carousel that spun colors into a rainbow every time it revolved.

This year, however, something was different. The animals didn't laugh when a clown fell off the Horse of Hope; they just shook their heads sadly after him. The balloons that floated out into the sky didn’t twirl as happily; they drooped like shadows in a storm.

On the last day of fair, while walking home through the quieter parts of the woods behind the festival site, Jamie noticed a little bird sitting on the edge of a branch. Its feathers were dull, no longer vibrant. Jamie remembered hearing about an old forest spirit named Lily late last summer. Every summer, Lily would put glitter into the animals' feathers to brighten them up. Maybe this bird had lost its sparkle too?

Curious, Jamie approached cautiously.
